privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task for creating a 3-page ActivInspire flipchart on the topic 'Should cell phones be allowed in schools?' Page 1 requires title 'Socratic Seminar' and discussion rules. Page 2 requires a T-Chart with 'Pro' and 'Con' columns and example arguments. Page 3 requires sentence starters. The file must be saved as 'cell_phone_debate.flipchart' in /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/. The T-Chart must contain at least 2 shapes (lines or rectangles). All content terms are verifiable through text search within the flipchart XML structure.
